exampleSentences: Anh tìm chìa khóa trong nhà.

definitions.es: dentro; en el interior de; en medio de
definitions.vi: ở bên trong; trong lòng; ở giữa
definitions.en: inside; within; in the midst of

example.vi: Cái hộp này có cái gì trong?

exampleSentencesTranslated: I put the book in the bag.
He looks for the key in the house.
She drinks water in the kitchen.
notes:
trong = “in / inside.” It shows something is inside a place, space, or container.

It goes before a noun and stays fixed: preposition + noun phrase.  

It can also mean “during” (time) and sometimes “among” (a group).  
Memory tip: trong (inside) ↔ ngoài (outside).

translation.en: I put the book in the bag.

sentenceBreakdowns: Anh (he) + tìm (look for) + chìa khóa (key) + trong (in) + nhà (house)

translation.en: I put the book in the bag.
